repair_candidate.summary: Repair #89800 by normalizing the semantic current session key consistently: use the already-trimmed requested key when deciding whether to take the WebChat current-session branch, and add regression coverage for whitespace-decorated "current" input.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(agents): normalize current session status key
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair #89800 by using the trimmed requested session key when detecting semantic `current`.
- Add regression coverage for whitespace-decorated `current` input in WebChat session_status resolution.
- Preserve @sweetcornna's source PR attribution.

## Source Credit
Based on https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/89800 by @sweetcornna.

## Validation
- `pnpm -s vitest run src/agents/openclaw-tools.session-status.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`
credit_notes: Thanks @sweetcornna for the source PR and focused WebChat current-session fix.
Preserve attribution to source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/89800 in any repair commit or PR body.
